input.command:
cd /home/user/sandbox/workspace && git add frontend/vercel.json && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Add vercel.json for SPA routing and correct build output dir

🤖 Generated with [vie](https://vie.dev)

Co-Authored-By: vie <noreply@vie.dev>
EOF
)" && git push origin HEAD:refs/heads/main 2>&1
